title: docs/podman.1: Link to hook documentation
body:
Collecting the Podman/libpod specifics in one place allows us to make the hooks README more generic.

I think this is a prereq to adding a Podman/libpod extended stage using the API from #758.

I've currently used a Markdown link here, although links aren't really a man-page thing.  The link will work on GitHub, but we may want some pre-processing to replace the link (and [our other existing links][1]?) when building for installation.  Maybe that means translating the current hooks README into a man page as well.  `oci-hooks.5`?

[1]: https://github.com/projectatomic/libpod/blame/v0.5.2/docs/podman.1.md#L60
